title: Flywheel Effect

content.statement: Build momentum through small, consistent pushes that compound over time.
content.question: What is the flywheel of your business and which step needs the most consistent push right now?
content.equation: Momentum = Disciplined Pushes per Month × Months Sustained
content.mental_model: Heavy flywheel, each push adds to all previous pushes.
content.business_lens: Identify your core flywheel (e.g., low prices → traffic → sellers → selection → traffic) and protect every component.
content.life_lens: Trust small consistent action over heroic sporadic effort.
sop: Map the loop where each step makes the next easier
Identify the activity that adds energy to the loop
Repeat it consistently regardless of short-term feedback
Track cumulative effects, not single events
Reinforce the loop; do not chase shiny alternatives
content.explainer: Amazon’s flywheel, lower prices → more customers → more sellers → larger selection → better experience → more customers, was drawn on a napkin and ran for two decades. The discipline is consistency in the face of slow visible progress.
questions: What is the flywheel of your business and which step needs the most consistent push right now?
Which step in your loop, if it sped up even slightly, would speed up every other step too?
What have you already stopped doing because it didn't show results in the first month?

definitions.def: A self-reinforcing loop where each small win makes the next one easier, so momentum compounds instead of resetting.

content.equation_example: 12 disciplined pushes per month × 24 months sustained = 288. A higher, rising score means the loop is starting to feed itself; a low or falling score means you're still pushing dead weight instead of a spinning wheel.
content.closing_statement: Momentum comes from repetition, not intensity.

caption:
Principle Nº 276: Flywheel Effect

Build momentum through small, consistent pushes that compound over time.

Ask yourself: What is the flywheel of your business and which step needs the most consistent push right now?
